_doc: Pi-pinned snapshot of session inspection RPC commands (get_session_stats + export_html). Sprint 6h₃ Phase 4.10. Used by tests/pi_parity/test_phase_4_10_strict_superset.py.

get_session_stats.body: const stats = session.getSessionStats(); return success(id, 'get_session_stats', stats);

export_html.body: const path = await session.exportToHtml(command.outputPath); return success(id, 'export_html', { path });

fields.sessionFile: string | undefined — path to the session JSONL file (undefined for in-memory)
fields.toolCalls: number — total tool-call blocks across all assistant messages
fields.tokens: { input: number, output: number, cacheRead: number, cacheWrite: number, total: number }
fields.contextUsage: ContextUsage | undefined — current token usage vs model's context window

context_usage_shape._doc: Pi parity: types.ts ContextUsage (already exists in Aelix Sprint 6 extensions/api.py:ContextUsage)

export_html_default_path._doc: When outputPath is omitted, Pi exports to a default location
export_html_default_path.default_pattern: Pi's default is implementation-specific (likely temp file or session-dir-relative); Aelix port can default to a tmpfile-style path

aelix_current_state.session_messages: Sprint 4 Session V3 ships message lists + token tracking via SessionV3Header + per-message metadata
aelix_current_state.context_usage_dataclass: ContextUsage dataclass exists at extensions/api.py:481 (Sprint 6 extension surface)
aelix_current_state.export_html_implementation: MISSING — Sprint 6h₃ adds a minimal HTML emitter (basic structure; Pi visual fidelity deferred)

deferred_to_sprint_6h_4: 5 session tree commands (switch_session, fork, clone, get_fork_messages, get_last_assistant_text)
Full Pi HTML export visual fidelity (CSS, syntax highlighting — Sprint 6h₃ ships minimal renderer)
